arc_summary.lifecycle: CANDIDATE(B-001) → WATCHING(B-007 first Abby-attack + suppression claim) → ACTIVE(B-015/B-016 incest-framing cluster + third-party reach confirmed)
dominant_mechanisms: Sexual predation/incest framing of Eli/Abby relationship — B-007 through B-029, multi-year sustained, 10+ instances
Physical harm allegations via Olivia relay — vaping (Category B weaponized), pinching (Category A unconfirmed), bruise (DARVO of protective behavior)
Alcoholism fabrication — single dinner beer distorted into 'drinking problem' pattern allegation
Self-danger conversion — Eli's legitimate parenting concerns reframed as admissions of danger (ROW-5302)
Inadequate-father enumeration — B-015 cluster lists legitimate parenting behaviors recast as neglect
arc_summary.sev3_basis: No formal CPS/police filings (CP2 Q3). Sev-3 justified by systematic false narrative communicated to multiple third parties: family members, Facebook (confirmed CP2 Q1 — no screenshots), and professional contact Christopher Campbell who cut all contact with Eli (Google message Nov 9 2020).
arc_summary.pre_dataset_anchor: Christopher Campbell Google message Nov 9 2020: 'maybe spend less time cheeting on your wife and i would have any respect for you' — photography work-partner who cut contact based on Melissa's narrative. Dataset period begins Jan 2022 — false narrative campaign was active 14+ months before dataset start.

arc_summary.lifecycle: CANDIDATE(B-001) → WATCHING(B-007 PROJ-003 suppression claim candidate) → ACTIVE(B-016 PROJ-002 confirmed + multiple pairs established)

projection_pairs.cross_rf_documentation: RF-09 ARC-RF09-001: 11-signal systematic reality-distortion pattern. DARVO-inversion dominant mechanism. Eli documented as consistent de-escalator across all 46 hostile episodes.

projection_pairs.accusation: 'Abby... is a liar, makes false allegations' (ROW-5862, B-016 Jun 30 2024)
projection_pairs.cross_rf_documentation: RF-15 ARC-RF15-001: Melissa has a documented systematic false allegation pattern communicated to multiple channels. No documented false allegations by Abby in the record.

projection_pairs.accusation: Suppression claim — 'Abby doesn't need to tell her she can't have a treat if she tells me' (B-007, ROW-2374, Apr 22 2023)
projection_pairs.cross_rf_documentation: RF-08 ARC-RF08-001: ROW-6819 is Melissa's explicit written coaching admission. The suppression allegation against Abby mirrors Melissa's own documented coaching behavior.

projection_pairs.accusation: 'Why do you keep trying to make Olivia think I'm abusing her?' (ROW-15588, B-031 Apr 12 2026)
projection_pairs.cross_rf_documentation: RF-11 ARC-RF11-001: Melissa's parentification pattern includes placing adult compliance decisions on Olivia, exposing Olivia to police report content, and weaponizing counselor statements. Eli's welfare check (asking about bruise on forearm) is protective behavior — the inverse of the documented pattern.

arc_summary.cp2_confirmation: Eli confirmed (Q5): 'Often times I notice that her accusations are often admissions.' Cross-RF record provides independent documentation for all four pairs.

key_calibrations: Q1: Incest/predation narrative confirmed communicated to family, Facebook, professional contact (Campbell Nov 2020). No formal filings (Q3). Sev-3 basis: systematic third-party reach, not institutional filing.

Q2: Vaping partially real (outside, not enclosed spaces) but weaponized in manufactured cat-allergy gatekeeping scheme (ADD-006 — allergy specialist visit; Olivia raised with pets from birth). Pinching unconfirmed (Category A). Bruise = legitimate welfare check DARVO'd by Melissa (PROJ-004).
Q3: No CPS filing, no police report by Melissa against Eli confirmed. Clean record for Eli (few speeding tickets only).
Q4: One beer with dinner before 7:30 pickup — 'well I had one with dinner which I had to hurry up and finish.' No substance problem, no DUI or drug charges.
Q5: Eli confirms 'her accusations are often admissions.' Systematic projection pattern confirmed generally; no additional text-specific instances beyond the record.
Q6: 'I'm sure she has but there is so much that happens in each exchange its hard to recall' — same emotional numbing pattern as RF-13 ADD-004.

gal_relevance_summary.third_party_narrative_alert: The incest/predation narrative was communicated outside the co-parenting channel to family members and on Facebook. The GAL's investigation may encounter these allegations from third-party sources. The text record provides the documentary refutation and the timeline of escalation.
gal_relevance_summary.harm_relay_alert: Physical harm allegations delivered via Olivia (vaping, pinching, bruise welfare check) reflect the RF-08 coaching mechanism. Olivia-sourced harm allegations in any context should be evaluated against the coaching admission record (ROW-6819).
gal_relevance_summary.projection_alert: Melissa's projection pattern (accusing Eli of documented-Melissa behaviors) creates a false-equivalence dynamic. For each of the four confirmed projection pairs, the cross-RF record documents only one party engaging in the behavior — documentary refutation is available for each.
gal_relevance_summary.cat_allergy_note: Olivia was raised from birth with two cats and a husky with no prior documented issues. Melissa took Olivia to an allergy specialist and then used the resulting documentation to deny visitation. This is a manufactured evidence chain. GAL should probe independently when evaluating health-based gatekeeping.

session_log.work: B-001 calibration written; CP2 questions generated and answered; addenda-RF-15.json confirmed (6 addenda); arc-states/RF-15-arc-state.json created; all 31 batch files written (B-001 through B-031); session interrupted before wrap-up files.

Wrap-up completed: RF-15-session-manifest.json created; pipeline-manifest.json updated (RF-15 status → complete, pending_checkpoints.cp2 cleared, sessions → 29, pipeline_status → tier1_complete, notes updated); memory/project_pipeline_state.md updated (RF-15 row + key findings + next step).
